printed.name: Frog Back
printed.setup: Facing back to Wunda Chair, arms bent, elbows facing back, hands placed on front edge of chair, palms facing back, legs bent, hips externally rotated, feet plantarflexed, toes on pedal, heels together, small V position

movement.inhale: Bend arms, lowering pedal, return to start position

cues: Keep elbows facing back, parallel to each other
Keep distance between heels and pelvis consistent (small)
